sections.paragraph:
m. widowhood, figuratively used of a state bereft of its king, Isa 47:9.

I. אַלְמָנָה f. a widow. (Arab.أَرْمَلَةُ Aram. ܐܰܪܡܰܠܬܳܐ) Gen 38:11 Exo 22:21, etc. Root אָלַם No. 3. Metaph. used of a state bereft of its king, Isa 47:1. (Compare verse Isa 47:9, and 54:4 .)

II. אַלְמָנֹות f. pl. Isa 13:22, palaces, i.q. אַדְמָנֹות (which is itself the reading of some copies), the letter ר being softened into ל as is frequently the case. Compare אַרְמֹון. Others retain the idea of a widow, and understand desolate palaces.
